test.create_query: CREATE TABLE bench_ch_dense_{n_dense} (pt Point, group_id UInt32) ENGINE = Memory
CREATE TABLE bench_ch_heavy_25k (pt Point) ENGINE = Memory
CREATE TABLE bench_ch_heavy_100k (pt Point) ENGINE = Memory
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO bench_ch_dense_{n_dense} SELECT (toFloat64((number * 1103515245 + 12345) % 100000) / 100, toFloat64((number * 6364136223 + 1) % 100000) / 100), number % 128 FROM numbers({n_dense})
INSERT INTO bench_ch_heavy_25k SELECT (sin(number) * 1000 + cos(number * 3) * 500, cos(number * 7) * 1000 + sin(number * 11) * 500) FROM numbers(25000)
INSERT INTO bench_ch_heavy_100k SELECT (sin(number) * 1000 + cos(number * 3) * 500, cos(number * 7) * 1000 + sin(number * 11) * 500) FROM numbers(100000)
test.query: SELECT groupConvexHull(pt) FROM bench_ch_dense_{n_dense} FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = 1
SELECT group_id, groupConvexHull(pt) FROM bench_ch_dense_{n_dense} GROUP BY group_id FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = 1
SELECT groupConvexHull(pt) FROM bench_ch_heavy_25k FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = 1
SELECT groupConvexHull(pt) FROM bench_ch_heavy_100k FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = 1
